overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a futuristic exosuit with a large backpack walking through a desolate rocky prairie landscape at night. The scene features a starry sky, mysterious vertical light beams in the distant horizon, and sparse vegetation as the character explores the open terrain.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the grassy terrain heading toward distant vertical light beams on the horizon

entered.detail: large rocky hillside with sparse grass covering the left side of the frame
tall vertical beams of light piercing the night sky in the far distance
dark blue night sky filled with visible stars
low-lying bushes and grass patches scattered across the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open prairie landscape at night, with a rocky hillside visible to the left and mysterious vertical light beams glowing on the distant horizon. The starry sky dominates the upper frame as the character moves steadily forward across the sparse terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approaching distant illuminated structures

events.description: character slightly adjusts walking direction to center on the distant light beams

agents.ego_description: character continues walking toward the distant lights, maintaining a steady pace across the grassy plain

entered.detail: cluster of small lights on the horizon beneath the vertical beams suggesting a distant settlement or facility
rocky hillside visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the open grassland as the distant illuminated structures become more defined on the horizon. The rocky hill on the left recedes into the distance while the vertical light beams remain centered ahead.

events.description: character turns left to face the rocky mountain slope on the left side

agents.ego_description: character turns left and begins walking toward the rocky mountain slope, exploring the terrain along the hillside

entered.detail: steep rocky mountainside with grass patches coming into close view on the left

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward the rocky mountain slope, bringing the hillside into close view on the left side of the frame. The vertical light beams and distant structures shift to the right background as the character explores along the mountain terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate nocturnal prairie that shifts from a wide-open trek toward a closer exploration of a rocky mountain slope. It begins with the character walking steadily through sparse terrain under a vast starry sky, with mysterious vertical light beams glowing on the distant horizon. As the character advances, the distant illuminated structures become more defined while the rocky hillside on the left gradually recedes. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, bringing the rugged mountain slope into close view. Finally, the vertical light beams and distant structures drift into the right background as the camera follows the character along the rocky terrain.
